items.title: Family Health
items.description: Organic choices for families and children
Organic products contain significantly fewer synthetic pesticide residues than conventional produce.
Organic dairy and meat come from animals not treated with growth hormones or routine antibiotics.
Some studies show organic produce may have higher levels of certain nutrients and antioxidants.
Organic products are guaranteed to be free from genetically modified organisms.
Many people report organic products taste better and have more flavor than conventional options.
Organic foods free from synthetic chemicals may support better digestive health.
Fewer synthetic additives and preservatives means less chemical burden on your body.
Organic farming supports environmental health, which indirectly benefits human wellbeing.
